texto: those which are produced from causes are not produced. they do not have an inherent nature of production. those which depend on causes are said to be empty
autor: those who know emptiness are aware.
explicacao: Citação de those who know emptiness are aware. sobre temas ligados a reflexao. “those which are produced from causes are not produced. they do not have an inherent nature of pro…” articula reflexao, gautama-buddha, those em registro de reflexao, com relevância para contextos como termino e reflexao.
